introduction: *A stout dwarf in well-kept chainmail raises his tankard in salute.*
Well met, traveler. You look like someone who stands their ground.
I do not march without proper cause.
Speak with the Mayor first. If he vouches for you, we can talk vows and battle plans.

options.text: Understood. I will see the Mayor.

introduction: I have kept watch over shrines and war-camps from the mountains to the marsh.
Steel is strong, but faith keeps it steady.
*He sets the tankard down and rises.*
The Mayor says you are fighting this darkness. Good.
If there is room in your ranks, my hammer and prayers are yours.

options.text: Join me. We will need your healing and your hammer.

introduction: *He eyes your crowded ranks with approval.*
You are well supplied with allies. Make space and I will be here.
I will keep your people standing. Point me where the need is greatest.
*He checks his holy symbol and war hammer.*
